items.title: Dem senator calls GOP’s CLARITY ethics proposal a ‘piece of shit’: Politico
items.summary: On Wednesday, Senate Republicans released the proposed text for the CLARITY Act, which has been met with pushback from Democrats regarding ethics provisions.

items.title: BitMEX delists 65 trading pairs, derivatives in July amid exchange shutdown
items.summary: BitMEX will have removed 65 derivative contracts and trading pairs in July, compared with just 19 across the first six months of the year.

items.title: SEC sets September talks on move toward 24-hour stock trading
items.summary: Nasdaq, Cboe and the London Stock Exchange are among major exchanges moving toward longer trading hours.

items.title: Black Forest Labs Unveils FLUX 3 AI: Ditches Stills for Video—And Robot Hands
items.summary: FLUX 3 is the German AI lab’s first video model, and the same system is already teaching robots to work an Audi assembly line.

items.title: Gemini sent $10M in Bitcoin to Trump PAC after joint motion with CFTC
items.summary: The Bitcoin donation can be used to support Donald Trump as a New York court considers whether to reverse a $5 million settlement between the CFTC and Gemini.

items.title: Coinbase lets businesses accept USDC payments from AI agents
items.summary: The exchange also introduced AI trading tools and a developer kit as part of a broader push to build financial infrastructure for autonomous AI agents.

items.title: Goldman Sachs CEO Breaks With Wall Street to Back Crypto Clarity Act
items.summary: Solomon's endorsement splits with JP Morgan's Jamie Dimon and banking trade groups, who warn the bill's stablecoin-yield provisions could pull deposits away from traditional lenders.

items.title: Bitcoin slides below $65K as Iran conflict fuels $100 oil and bond-yield surge
items.summary: Bitcoin price forecasts diverge as US-Iran war tensions fueled an ongoing oil and bond-market surge, while July Fed rate-hike odds neared 40%.

items.title: Clarity Act expected to miss its window before Congress' summer break, leadership says
items.summary: The deadline to get the crypto market structure bill done before senators scatter will likely be missed, says Majority Leader Thune, though it may get a start before then.

items.title: Nasdaq-Listed Zhibao Wants a Bitcoin Treasury, Plans to Sell $220M in Stock for BTC
items.summary: A Shanghai-based insurance-tech company trading below $1 wants to build a bitcoin treasury by taking BTC directly as payment for new shares.

items.title: As BitMEX exits, analysts warn crypto consolidation is accelerating
items.summary: BitMEX’s shutdown marks the end of one of crypto’s earliest derivatives exchanges as analysts point to rising regulatory costs, market concentration and the shift toward licensed trading venues.

items.title: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev's X account hacked to promote token amid memecoin frenzy
items.summary: The post, now deleted, touted a token called $VLAD and falsely claimed it would be listed on Robinhood.

items.title: Tassat wants to help smaller banks tap the trillion-dollar stablecoin boom before Wall Street lock them out
items.summary: The former Signet developer aims to launch early next year a marketplace connecting stablecoin issuers with regional lenders to manage reserves.

items.title: Robinhood CEO’s X account hacked in apparent memecoin scam
items.summary: A hacker reportedly took over Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev’s X account to promote a fake “VLAD” memecoin, posting what appeared to be a malicious token contract address.

items.title: Brazilian Farmers Are Tokenizing Cows to Get Farm Loans—And It's Working
items.summary: The first tokenized livestock deal on Brazil's stock exchange offers dairy farmers a lifeline as the sector's credit crisis deepens.

items.title: Goldman Sachs CEO backs ‘not perfect’ CLARITY Act as vote expected soon

items.title: Coinbase's corporate customers can now accept payments from AI agents
